briefs.title: BC Ferries route designations updated under Coastal Ferry Act — schedule amended
briefs.summary: The BC government updated the official list of designated ferry routes (the routes BC Ferries is required to operate) by amending Schedule A of the Designation Regulation. The updated pages are not published publicly but can be reviewed at BC Ferries' Victoria head office or on the BC Ferries website under the Governance section.
briefs.action_required: Check the updated route designations at bcferries.com under Governance > Coastal Ferry Act if your business depends on specific BC Ferries routes.
